data.title: HTTPS Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data transferred between the user and the website is encrypted for security.

data.title: Cross-Site Scripting Protection
data.description: Prevents injection attacks by sanitizing user inputs to avoid execution of malicious scripts.
data.technical_spec: Security libraries in use like DOMPurify.

data.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
data.description: Helps prevent a range of attacks by specifying what content can be executed or rendered.
data.technical_spec: Header setup to restrict resource loading.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Implements defenses to withstand Distributed Denial of Service attacks and maintain availability.
data.technical_spec: Anti-DDoS services like Cloudflare's DDoS Protection.

data.title: Secure Cookies
data.description: Cookies are flagged as Secure and HttpOnly to prevent interception and misuse.
data.technical_spec: Configured via Set-Cookie headers with appropriate flags.
